component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
component-based-security/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; without this change, the build would target JDK 11, potentially missing JDK 21 features or failing compatibility checks if strict version enforcement is in place.

component-based-security/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL connector dependency with the new group ID and explicit version.
component-based-security/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer build environments; the new 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is required for modern JDBC support.

jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication1/.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication1/.why_exists: The project will not compile or run correctly on JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains set to 1.8, potentially causing class version mismatches or missing language features.

jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication3/.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication3/.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if the codebase relies on newer APIs.

jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication3/.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL Connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication3/.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer build repositories; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the current standard.

jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication3/.general_idea: Explicitly set the version for the new MySQL Connector dependency.
jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication3/.why_exists: Without an explicit version, the build might fail or pick an incompatible version if not managed by a parent BOM that includes this specific new artifact.

jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication4/.general_idea: Update maven.compiler.source from 11 to 21 to ensure source code is compiled for JDK 21.
jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication4/.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler targets JDK 11 language features, preventing the use of JDK 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring JDK 21.

jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication4/.general_idea: Update maven.compiler.target from 11 to 21 to ensure bytecode is generated for JDK 21.
jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication4/.why_exists: Without this change, the generated bytecode is for JDK 11, which may fail to run on JDK 21 if it relies on newer class file versions or if the runtime enforces strict version matching.

jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication5/.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication5/.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; keeping version 11 would result in incorrect compilation targets or runtime incompatibilities with JDK 21 features.

jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication5/.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID required for modern versions.
jwt-authentications/jwt-authentication5/.why_exists: The artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated/removed in newer repositories; using it causes dependency resolution failures or runtime classpath issues on modern JDKs.
